---
title: "openpipeline_rapids"
description: "Auto-generated reference — populated on release."
listing:
  contents: "*/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, namespace, description]
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
---

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}
**Auto-generated.** Pages under `reference/openpipeline_rapids/` are produced from the
[`openpipeline_rapids`](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_rapids) package's `config.vsh.yaml`
files on release. This folder is empty until the generation workflow runs.
:::
